comment: Human-curated conversion waivers. An enchant containing a waived effect converts even though the gem cannot carry that effect. Add entries when write-calibration's 'pinned:' lines name something ruled perk-domain or redundant.

waivedEffects.why: Lockpick durability is a Lockpicking-perk effect in Requiem; the enchant copy is redundant for any character investing in the tree (Marth, 2026-07-10).
